entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Large Language Model - primary value is capacity for patient, structured ingestion rather than writing ability

entities.name: Input System
entities.context: Systematic listening and understanding as a defensible moat when AI commoditizes content generation

entities.name: Output Commoditization
entities.context: AI-driven state where content generation becomes a commodity due to writer's surplus

entities.name: Writer's Surplus
entities.context: Condition where everyone can produce high-quality output, making output itself a commodity

entities.name: Ingestion Phase
entities.context: Workflow phase prioritizing giving AI more context, longer transcripts, and diverse data

entities.name: Prompt Engineering
entities.context: Technique for crafting AI prompts - deprioritized relative to ingestion phase

entities.name: Broadcast Media
entities.context: Traditional push model for content distribution - contrasted with algorithmic curation

entities.name: Algorithmic Curation
entities.context: Pull/ingest model that replaced broadcast media - parallel to input-over-output shift

relationships.context: Input becomes more defensible moat than output as AI commoditizes content generation
Primary professional value is patient, structured ingestion capacity
When everyone can produce quality output, output becomes commodity
Workflow design should prioritize ingestion over prompt engineering for final outputs
Historical transition from push to pull/ingest mirrors input-over-output thesis
Both represent shift toward selection and synthesis over production
